title: mazus pumilus
intro: Mazus pumilus, also known as the dwarf mazus or little mazus, is a flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mazus pumilus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. Mazus pumilus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with its leaves and stems being used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
